electroacoustic.frequency_range_note: Usable bandwidth at -10 dB with [12XTP_FR]/[12XTA_FR] preset; extendable down to 32 Hz in LOW-EXTENSION mode with the SB18 subwoofer
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 133 dB peak at 1 m, free field, 10 dB crest-factor pink noise with [12XTA_FI] preset (datasheet figure spans the active/passive cabinet)
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 12 in weather-resistant LF transducer coaxially loaded with 1 x 3 in diaphragm compression driver, in a bass-reflex tuned Baltic birch cabinet; passive mode uses an onboard third-order crossover network

amplification.preset_note: FULL RANGE uses the base [12XTP_FR/FI/MO] presets; HIGH-PASS adds the _100 variants (100 Hz high-pass) for SB18 pairing; LOW-EXTENSION requires a custom preset built in LA Network Manager. FRONT/FILL/MONITOR variants target FOH, distributed-fill, and half-space (floor/wall/ceiling) use respectively.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON, wired in parallel (interchangeable IN/LINK for daisy-chaining a second 12XT)
connection.wiring_passive: pin 1+/1- carries the full-range input signal; pins 2+/2- not used in passive mode
connection.amp_to_cabinet_note: Each PASSIVE 12XT connects to one LA4/LA4X output channel (channels 1-4 all usable in passive mode)

physical.cabinet: 18, 24 and 30 mm Baltic birch plywood, wedge-shaped with 30 and 60 degree fixed tilt angles
physical.grille: Polyester-powder-coated steel grille with acoustically transparent Airnet cloth

modes: Stacked/floor monitor with 30 or 60 degree wedge angle
Pole-mounted via integrated 35 mm pole socket
Wall or ceiling mount with ETR12-2 U-bracket
Wall or ceiling mount with Omnimount 120.0 series (four M8 inserts)
deployment.rigging_note: ETR12-2 general standard limit is one 12XT per bracket; consult the XT and P rigging procedures manual

usage: Multipurpose 90-degree coaxial point-and-shoot cabinet for FOH, distributed fill, and stage/floor monitoring; the wedge cabinet gives 30/60-degree monitor tilt without extra hardware.
Set the rear ACTIVE/PASSIVE switch to PASSIVE and load a matching [12XTP_*] preset - mismatching the switch and preset can destroy the transducers and voids warranty.
In passive mode one LA4/LA4X drives up to four 12XT (one per channel, channels 1-4), each presenting an 8-ohm load, making it an efficient choice for distributed installs.

Use the FULL RANGE [12XTP_FR/FI/MO] presets for standalone full-bandwidth (55 Hz-20 kHz) operation; pick FRONT for FOH voicing, FILL for flat free-field response, MONITOR for half-space floor/wall/ceiling placement.

To extend low end, run HIGH-PASS (_100) presets with an SB18 sub, or LOW-EXTENSION mode (custom preset) which puts up to two 12XT and two SB18 on one LA4/LA4X and reaches down to 32 Hz; recommended ratio is one 12XT per SB18.
Daisy-chain a second cabinet through the parallel 2x 4-point speakON connectors using SP.7/SP10/SP25 cables, keeping in mind a maximum of one passive 12XT per amplifier output channel.
